cap E { fn op(): A }
fn f(h: E): A / {} { handle E with h in E.op }
---
f : fn(E) -> A
==========
cap E { fn op(): A }
fn f(h: E, a: A): A / {} { handle E with h in a }
---
f : fn(E, A) -> A
==========
cap E { fn op(): A }
fn f(): A / {} { E }
---
ERROR: unknown variable `E`
==========
cap E { fn op(): A }
fn f(h: thunk B): A / {} { handle E with h in a }
---
ERROR: type mismatch
==========
cap E { fn op(): A }
fn f(a: A): A / {} { handle E with bundle { fn op() { a } } in E.op }
---
f : fn(A) -> A
==========
cap E1 { fn op1(): A }
cap E2 { fn op2(): B }
fn f(h1: E1, h2: E2): A / {} { handle E1 with h1 in handle E2 with h2 in E1.op1 }
---
f : fn(E1, E2) -> A
==========
cap E { fn op(): A }
fn f(h1: E, h2: E): A / {} { handle E with h1 in handle E with h2 in E.op }
---
f : fn(E, E) -> A
==========
cap Transform { fn apply(x: A): B }
fn f(a: A, b: B): B / {} { handle Transform with bundle { fn apply(x) { b } } in Transform.apply(a) }
---
f : fn(A, B) -> B
==========
cap E { fn op1(): A; fn op2(x: A): B }
fn f(a: A, b: B): A / {} { handle E with bundle { fn op1() { a }; fn op2(x) { b } } in E.op1 }
---
f : fn(A, B) -> A
==========
cap Ok { fn op(): A }
fn f(a: A): A / {} { handle Ok with bundle { fn op() { a } } in Ok.op }
---
f : fn(A) -> A
==========
cap E { fn op1(): A; fn op2(): B }
fn f(a: A): A / {} { handle E with bundle { fn op1() { a } } in E.op1 }
---
ERROR: missing operation
==========
cap E { fn op(): A }
fn f(a: A): A / {} { handle E with bundle { fn op() { a }; fn bogus() { a } } in E.op }
---
ERROR: not an operation
==========
fn f(a: A): A / {} { let x = a.field; x }
---
ERROR: member access `.field` on type `A`
==========
cap E { fn op(): A }
fn f(h: E): A / {} { handle E with h in E.bogus }
---
ERROR: no operation
